description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a round, slightly asymmetrical shape and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin is predominantly a pale yellow-green, overlaid with streaks and patches of muted red and pink, giving it a marbled appearance. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with subtle dimples and natural textural variations typical of fresh apples. The coloration is uneven, with some sides showing more red blush while others are lighter and more yellow. There are no visible stickers, labels, or blemishes on the skin, and the apple appears fresh and intact. The overall look suggests a crisp, juicy interior beneath the thin skin.
description: A round, pale yellow-green apple with red streaks and a short stem. Its smooth, glossy skin is free of blemishes and has a fresh, natural appearance.
description_view_0: The apple shows a balanced mix of red and yellow-green with the stem clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side is lighter, with more yellow-green and fewer red streaks.
description_view_2: The apple appears rounder here, with a subtle red blush over a pale background.
description_view_3: This view highlights a more even blend of red and yellow-green, with the stem slightly off-center.
